back_translation: ‘Write to the angel of the church in the city of Sardis. The One who has the seven Spirits of God and the seven stars says thus: We know your deeds, that you have a name that you are alive, but you are dead
Wake up, and strengthen what still remains, which is about to die, because We have not found your deeds complete in the presence of Our God
Therefore, remember how you have received and heard. Keep it, and repent. If you do not wake up, We will come like a thief, and you will not know in what hour We will come to you
But you have some people in the city of Sardis who have not soiled their garments, and they will walk with Us in white clothing, because they are worthy

The one who overcomes will be clothed in white garments likewise, and We will not blot out his name from the book of life, and We will confess his name in the presence of Our Father, and before His angels
Whoever has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the churches
Write to the angel of the church in the city of Philadelphia. The One who is holy, who is true, who holds the key of David, who opens and no one can shut, and who shuts and no one can open, says thus
We know your deeds. Behold, We have placed an open door before you, which no one can shut. Because you have little strength, but you have kept Our word, and have not denied Our name

Behold, We will cause some from the synagogue of Satan, those who claim to be Jews but are not, but lie, behold, We will make them come and bow down before your feet, and will know that We have loved you
Because you have kept the word of Our perseverance, We will also keep you from the hour of testing that is about to come upon all the earth, to test those who dwell on the earth
We are coming quickly. Hold fast to what you have, so that no one will take away your crown

The one who overcomes, We will make him a pillar in the temple of Our God. And he will not go outside again. And We will write the name of Our God upon him, and the name of the city of Our God, namely the new Jerusalem, that is coming down from heaven from Our God, and Our new name
Whoever has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the churches
Write to the angel of the church in the city of Laodicea. The One who is the Amen, the witness who is faithful and true, the One who is the originator of God's creation, says thus
We know your deeds, that you are not cold and not hot. We wish you were either cold or hot
Therefore, because you are lukewarm, neither hot nor cold, We are about to vomit you out of Our mouth
Because you say, ‘I am rich, I have grown wealthy, and I lack nothing.’ But you do not know that you are pitiful, miserable, poor, blind, and naked

We counsel you to buy from Us gold that has been refined by fire, so that you may be rich, and white garments so that you may be clothed and the shame of your nakedness will not be exposed, and eye-salve to anoint your eyes so that you may see
The ones whom We love, We rebuke and discipline. Therefore, be earnest and repent
Behold, We stand at the door and knock. If anyone hears Our voice and opens the door, We will come in to him, and will dine with him, and he with Us
The one who overcomes, We will give him to sit with Us on Our throne, just as We Ourselves have overcome and have sat with Our Father on His throne
Whoever has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the churches’
